query:
update word set
    source_text =
        case
            when $2::text[] != '{}' and $2[1] is not null then $2[1]
            else source_text
        end,
    simple_phonetics =
        case
            when $3::text[] != '{}' and $3[1] is not null then $3[1] 
            else simple_phonetics
        end,
    commentary =
        case
            when $4::text[] != '{}' and $4[1] is not null then $4[1]
            else commentary
        end,
    english_gloss =
        case
            when $5::text[] != '{}' and $5[1] is not null then $5[1]
            else english_gloss
        end

-- editing_lock_token check ensures only the session that holds the lock
-- can save. If the lock has expired and someone else acquired it, this query
-- updates zero rows and the caller fails.
where id = $1 and editing_lock_token = $6
returning word.document_id;
